name: d5_acc_only
drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $a0_0 : ArrayList() from collect( T1(f1 == false, f1 != true) )
then
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
when
    accumulate( T0($s1_0 : f0); $a1_0 : average($s1_0) )
then
    insertLogical(new T1(2 + 5, false));
end
rule "R4"
salience -6
when
    $p4_0 : T0()
then
    delete($p4_0);
end
